subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face toward the Realm of Eternity and who dwellest beneath the shade of thy Lord's grace, the Lord of Names! That which was ordained hath come to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المتوجه الی شطر البقاء و الساکن فی ظل فضل ربک مالک الاسماء قد ورد ما کان
